---
title: "zealhmm — teosinte-introgression QTL recovery"
subtitle: "Reproductions and low-coverage ancestry-calling benchmarks for two maize×teosinte populations"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

Analysis notebooks for recovering QTL from teosinte introgressions under low-coverage
genotyping. Two populations: **TeoNAM** (Chen 2019, W22 × 5 teosinte inbreds, BC1S4 RILs —
the faithful reproduction) and **ZEAL/BZea** (B73 × teosinte BC2S3 near-isogenic lines — the
new build from real skim + field data). Data provenance: [DATA.html](DATA.html).

# TeoNAM — Chen 2019 reproduction

W22 × {TIL01, TIL03, TIL11, TIL14, TIL25}; 1,257 BC1S4 RILs; 118K / 51K SNP panels, v5.

### QTL recovery (GWAS + JLM)

- [teonam-qtl-recovery](analysis/teonam-qtl-recovery.html) — the core QTL-recovery reproduction.
- [teonam-qtl-recovery-118k](analysis/teonam-qtl-recovery-118k.html) — authentic 118K panel, OLS GWAS + JLM + coverage sweep.
- [teonam-qtl-recovery-mlm-118k](analysis/teonam-qtl-recovery-mlm-118k.html) — the MLM (Family + K) counterpart (STAM).
- [teonam-qtl-recovery-dta-mlm-118k](analysis/teonam-qtl-recovery-dta-mlm-118k.html) — **DTA** MLM composite + five-caller degradation sweep + caller noisiness.

### STAM GWAS model comparisons

- [teonam-stam-mlm-gwas-118k](analysis/teonam-stam-mlm-gwas-118k.html) — TASSEL Q=5PC + Centered-IBS K, the exact Fig-4C model + QQ/λ_GC.
- [teonam-stam-ols-gwas-118k](analysis/teonam-stam-ols-gwas-118k.html) — OLS (Family + marker) on the 118K panel.
- [teonam-stam-mlm-gwas-interpolated](analysis/teonam-stam-mlm-gwas-interpolated.html) — MLM on the interpolated 51K map panel.
- [teonam-stam-ols-gwas-family-imputed](analysis/teonam-stam-ols-gwas-family-imputed.html) — OLS on the family-imputed panel.

### Maps, callers & methods

- [teonam-genetic-map](analysis/teonam-genetic-map.html) — native v5 R/qtl composite genetic map.
- [marker-thinning](analysis/marker-thinning.html) — cM thinning (JLM/ancestry grid) as a Max Distance-d Independent Set.
- [callers-and-methods](analysis/callers-and-methods.html) — the ancestry callers (nNIL, RTIGER, LB-Impute, binhmm, control).
- [simulation-calibration](analysis/simulation-calibration.html) — per-coverage caller calibration on simulated BC truth.
- [rtiger_vs_nilhmm_reproduction](analysis/rtiger_vs_nilhmm_reproduction.html) — RTIGER vs nilHMM ancestry agreement.
- [nilhmm_sanity_check_paint](analysis/nilhmm_sanity_check_paint.html) — nilHMM ancestry-painting sanity check.
- [source-method-comparison](analysis/source-method-comparison.html) · [b1-mapping-benchmark](analysis/b1-mapping-benchmark.html) — source/method comparisons.

# ZEAL / BZea — Zea Exotic Allele Library

B73 × teosinte BC2S3 near-isogenic lines; **5 teosinte taxa** (Zx *mexicana*, Zv *parviglumis*,
Zd *diploperennis*, Zl *luxurians*, Zh *huehuetenangensis*); SNP50K panel at ~0.4× skim.
Built end-to-end from field books + skim counts: samplesheet → SpATS BLUEs → SNP50K dosage →
RTIGER ancestry mosaic → K → JLM + MLM.

### DTA (days to anthesis)

- [zeal-qtl-recovery-dta-mlm-snp50k](analysis/zeal-qtl-recovery-dta-mlm-snp50k.html) — DTA JLM + MLM (Taxon + K) composite (A: JLM · B: per-SNP · C: RTIGER mosaic) + five-caller comparison. Nominal significance (LOD 5).
- [zeal-qtl-recovery-dta-mlm-snp50k-fdr](analysis/zeal-qtl-recovery-dta-mlm-snp50k-fdr.html) — the same, with **Benjamini–Hochberg FDR ≤ 0.05** significance (per-scan q-values); *zmcct10* significant under the RTIGER/binhmm/nNIL mosaics.

*Key result:* JLM recovers *zmcct10* (chr10 photoperiod QTL); the MLM confound (K = teosinte-ancestry
relatedness) suppresses the ancestry-collinear flowering peaks; and at 0.4× the ancestry calling
must be block/bin-aggregated (RTIGER, binhmm) — per-SNP calling under-calls teosinte.
